plot_specs.title: H1 Sales Trend (Jan–Jun)
plot_specs.rationale: Executive view of overall first-half momentum and seasonality; anchors the story before breaking down drivers.

plot_specs.title: H1 Sales by Region (Jan–Jun)
plot_specs.rationale: Shows which regions contributed most to first-half performance; supports resource reallocation and regional action plans.

plot_specs.title: H1 Sales by Category (Jan–Jun)
plot_specs.rationale: Identifies category winners/laggards in H1; informs merchandising, pricing, and inventory priorities.

plot_specs.title: Marketing Spend vs Sales (H1)
plot_specs.rationale: Tests whether higher spend is translating into revenue and highlights regional efficiency differences to guide budget shifts.

plot_specs.title: Units vs Sales (H1)
plot_specs.rationale: Separates price/mix effects from volume effects; reveals whether growth is coming from selling more units or higher average selling price/mix by category.

slides.title: H1 performance at a glance
slides.purpose: Set the executive context on first-half momentum and where to focus next.
bullets: Summarize Jan–Jun sales trajectory and any inflection points
Call out best vs weakest months to frame seasonality and pacing
Preview key driver cuts: region, category, and marketing efficiency

slides.title: Where growth came from: regions
slides.purpose: Identify which regions drove H1 results and where intervention is needed.
bullets: Rank regions by total H1 sales contribution
Highlight concentration risk if one region dominates
Recommend actions: double down in top region(s) and diagnose underperformers (channel, assortment, promo)

slides.title: What’s selling: category mix
slides.purpose: Pinpoint category winners/laggards to guide merchandising and inventory decisions.
bullets: Compare H1 sales across categories to spot leaders and drags
Use results to prioritize inventory, pricing, and onsite placement
Flag categories needing turnaround plans (promo strategy, bundling, content, availability)

slides.title: Is marketing spend paying off?
slides.purpose: Assess spend-to-sales relationship and identify budget reallocation opportunities.
bullets: Check whether higher marketing_spend correlates with higher sales in H1
Compare efficiency patterns by region to find over/under-invested areas
Action: shift budget toward regions showing stronger sales response; test/trim where response is weak

slides.title: H2 priorities & decisions
slides.purpose: Convert H1 insights into a focused action plan and asks for leadership.
bullets: Rebalance budgets by regional efficiency; set guardrails and weekly KPIs (sales, units, marketing_spend)
Prioritize top categories for supply and placement; launch fixes for laggards
Align on 2–3 near-term experiments (promo, pricing, assortment) and owners/timelines
